closureNote: This tranche establishes generated workflow contracts, unified typed error mapping, snapshot-bound diagnostics execution, real NAPI/WASM/CLI diagnostics parity, and explicit public/debug response partitions. It does not declare the broader API program complete; the open entries retain ownership for workspace runtime workflows, LSP and error-path coverage, input normalization, evidence binding, source maps, and the all-surface oracle family.

entries.scope: Implement open-workspace, snapshot, query, build, and explain execution over one workspace runtime; diagnostics is the only executable SDK workflow in this tranche.
Drive the diagnostics workflow through the LSP publication boundary and compare its canonical semantic result with the other exported surfaces.
Compare typed failures from inline NAPI and WASM build-context parsing; the CLI remains file-fed and requires a separately normalized input contract.
Unify empty style-path behavior between NAPI/WASM argument normalization and the file-fed CLI contract.
Bind OmenaErrorContext evidence identifiers to durable evidence-graph records without widening the public response payload by default.
Compare source-map mappings and original-source identities across build and explain surface adapters.
Register all executable SDK workflows and all four product surfaces on the shared differential oracle harness.
